title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF CABUAYA, MUNICIPALITY OF MATI, PROVINCE OF DAVAO, TO BARRIO DAWAN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5254 / 53 OG No. 16, 5141 (August 31, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1701, June 21, 1957 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF CABUAYA, MUNICIPALITY OF MATI, PROVINCE OF DAVAO, TO BARRIO DAWAN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the barrio of Cabuaya, Municipality of Mati, Province of Davao, is changed to barrio Dawan.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1957.
